description: Welcome to ADDITION, a collection of 87 3-bedroom plus rooftop townhomes perfectly situated between Willoughby + Willowbrook and developed by Redekop Ferrario Properties. This 3 bedroom home offers over 1,400 sqft of living space plus a 600 sqft rooftop patio and gated backyard. In the kitchen enjoy Samsung Kitchen appliances including a 36” fridge, gas range and convenient pantry. Premium features come standard including: Heat pump with Air Conditioning, finished gas barbecue connections and roughed-in EV car charging. Enjoy views above Langley from a spacious rooftop patio.
